name: california-calaveras
description: Calaveras County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: Calaveras County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past Calaveras County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('Calaveras County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: Calaveras County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract Calaveras County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-calaveras-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-calaveras-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
The HTML contains a nested navigation menu structure under <div id="dnn_main_menu"> with <ol> and <li> elements.
Supervisor links are located inside <li class="edsmm_menuItem"> elements with specific child classes like 'Supervisors', 'District1', 'District2', etc.
The 'detailUrl' is found in the 'href' attribute of <a class="edsmm_itemContainer"> elements within the menu items.
The 'name' field is present in the <span> text content immediately preceding the <a> tag within the <li> elements.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for Calaveras County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: Calaveras County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for Calaveras County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: Calaveras County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
NOTE: UNCERTAIN — No NetFile portal found for Calaveras; uses county elections site for disclosure.
